scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('npm', ['run', 'typecheck'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);" --
